channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Hackney Park waste bag dumped on street, 20th June
item.description:
As above

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Grazebrook Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Overgrown pavement hedges, 20th June
item.description:
Hedges restricted the pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westcombe Hill, Blackheath

item.title: Drain cover broken, 20th June
item.description:
Drain cover outside Hayward House has been broken. Today a child tripped over it and hurt himself.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brooke Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Footpath blocked by overhanging branches, 20th June
item.description:
The trees are completely blocking access along one side of the pavement. Please arrange for them to be cut back.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crescent Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cars blocked Grange Drive, 20th June
item.description:
Cars blocked Grange Drive. The last vehicle to park was the red Scenic reg KS75 LHR

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grange Drive, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflooding manhoole, 20th June
item.description:
Overflooding round manhoole in front if n.23 Wellington Gardens. It's constantly leaking since months.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wellington Gardens, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 20th June
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Court Farm Road, Mottingham, Greater London

item.title: Tree needs pruning as shooting from the base, 20th June
item.description:
The pavement area has been narrowed due to the bushy lower section of the trunk

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): The Grove, Southgate

item.title: Graffiti, 20th June
item.description:
Graffiti on public litter bin by entrance to school.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 67, South Eden Park Road, Eden Park, Greater London

item.title: State of road surface in Harborough Avenue beginning to get dangerous, 20th June
item.description:
State of Road with numerous potholes, cracks and damage causing damage to vehicles.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Harborough Avenue, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping at skatepark below flyover, 20th June
item.description:
Fly tipping at skatepark on Lee Conservancy road A12 flyover

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eastway, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Repeated dog waste on road leading to children’s nursery, 20th June
item.description:
Disgusting. And appears to be constant each day. Never cleaned and likely to be related to veterinary surgery. Nursery children walking through it daily on drop-off/pick-up. Nothing seems to change.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stanhope Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree in private property/ council alley causing damage to property, 20th June
item.description:
Tree that is in alley running between houses and garages is overgrown causing damage to our garage/outhouse roof. Despite attempts to resolve remains outstanding. If this continues a new roof will be required and a danger

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 42, Harborough Avenue, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 105, 77 and 91 Brondesbury villas, 20th June
item.description:
Suitcase rug doors construction wood poles

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Flypostering, 20th June
item.description:
Outside no 6-10 Westwood Hill Remove flypostering from bus shelter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westwood Hill, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Garden Maintenance, 20th June
item.description:
Tree at the back of Moffatt residents Garden needs cutting as is covering the paving. The ground needs weeding and moss killing/scraping away.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Redcar Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Doors and rubbish dumped, 20th June
item.description:
Alongside my house down the walk way are doors, unit and black bin bags. More is being left over the last week

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Armitage Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet
